fixture: 027_delete_all_rows

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE tasks (id INTEGER NOT NULL, priority INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO tasks VALUES (1, 1)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO tasks VALUES (2, 2)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    DELETE FROM tasks WHERE priority >= 1
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 2

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT id, priority FROM tasks
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] priority INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      <empty>
